creator: croyle@gelemna.ft-wayne.in.us
text:
These diffs update the x11-wm/blackbox port to use the latest
distfile.  Seems like as soon as one update gets committed, the author
releases a new version.

Fix: Apply this patch.  Note that this deletes patches/patch-ab and adds
patches/patch-ac (replacing a fix for a bogusity in the Imakefile with
a fix for a bogusity in the configure script).
